name: abp-skills-compat-ts-extensible
//: Separate from compat-ts/ because @abp/ng.components pulls @abp/ng.theme.shared -> @swimlane/ngx-datatable, whose Angular peer tops out at 20. This workspace pins Angular 20 so the extension API (extend-angular-module-ui) can be compile-checked. It builds with `npm ci && npm run build` only (no `npm ls`, since the ngx-datatable peer is invalid-but-harmless here — the smoke imports only pure-TS classes from @abp/ng.components/extensible).
